name: Chisel
description: Fast TCP/UDP tunnel over HTTP, used for pivoting and port forwarding. Tool: https://github.com/jpillora/chisel. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #197 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Chisel output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
